---
title: AIRA seminar
subtitle: "Explaining Models of Modelling Explanations?"
venue: GEIST Research Group, Poland
description: >-
  Slides for my AIRA seminar.
date: 2026-04-16
draft: false
---

You can find the slides below or click [here](presentation.html){target="_blank"} to open them in full screen. 

For the PDF version of the slides use this [link](presentation.pdf){target="_blank"} instead. 

```{=html}
<iframe width="800" height="500" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0" src="presentation.html"></iframe>
```
